%_where.1 (Arg_0.1: pred[50,3], Arg_1.1: f32[50,3], Arg_2.1: f32[50,3]) -> f32[50,3] {
  %Arg_0.1 = pred[50,3]{1,0} parameter(0)
  %Arg_1.1 = f32[50,3]{1,0} parameter(1)
  %Arg_2.1 = f32[50,3]{1,0} parameter(2)
  ROOT %select_n.1 = f32[50,3]{1,0} select(%Arg_0.1, %Arg_1.1, %Arg_2.1), metadata={op_name="select_n"}
}

%_linspace.2 (Arg_0.3: f32[], Arg_1.3: f32[]) -> f32[15] {
  %Arg_0.3 = f32[] parameter(0)
  %reshape.2 = f32[1]{0} reshape(%Arg_0.3), metadata={op_name="reshape"}
  %mul.17 = f32[1]{0} broadcast(%reshape.2), dimensions={0}, metadata={op_name="mul"}
  %mul.18 = f32[] reshape(%mul.17), metadata={op_name="mul"}
  %mul.19 = f32[14]{0} broadcast(%mul.18), dimensions={}, metadata={op_name="mul"}
  %constant.39 = f32[] constant(1)
  %broadcast.11 = f32[14]{0} broadcast(%constant.39), dimensions={}
  %iota.1 = f32[14]{0} iota(), iota_dimension=0, metadata={op_name="iota"}
  %constant.40 = f32[] constant(14)
  %broadcast.12 = f32[14]{0} broadcast(%constant.40), dimensions={}
  %div.2 = f32[14]{0} divide(%iota.1, %broadcast.12), metadata={op_name="div"}
  %sub.1 = f32[14]{0} subtract(%broadcast.11, %div.2), metadata={op_name="sub"}
  %mul.20 = f32[14]{0} multiply(%mul.19, %sub.1), metadata={op_name="mul"}
  %Arg_1.3 = f32[] parameter(1)
  %reshape.3 = f32[1]{0} reshape(%Arg_1.3), metadata={op_name="reshape"}
  %mul.21 = f32[1]{0} broadcast(%reshape.3), dimensions={0}, metadata={op_name="mul"}
  %mul.22 = f32[] reshape(%mul.21), metadata={op_name="mul"}
  %mul.23 = f32[14]{0} broadcast(%mul.22), dimensions={}, metadata={op_name="mul"}
  %mul.24 = f32[14]{0} multiply(%mul.23, %div.2), metadata={op_name="mul"}
  %add.27 = f32[14]{0} add(%mul.20, %mul.24), metadata={op_name="add"}
  %broadcast_in_dim.9 = f32[1]{0} reshape(%Arg_1.3), metadata={op_name="broadcast_in_dim"}
  ROOT %concatenate.2 = f32[15]{0} concatenate(%add.27, %broadcast_in_dim.9), dimensions={0}, metadata={op_name="concatenate"}
}
